hero.title: Own Your Customer

benefits.title: Why AUTOWHATS?

features.title: Autonomous AI Agents
features.description: Deploy AI that learns your business and handles 80% of routine inquiries instantly.

features.title: Multi-Session Inbox
features.description: Manage dozens of WhatsApp numbers from a single, unified team interface.

features.title: Smart Automations
features.description: Build complex message chains and workflows triggered by user behavior.

features.title: Team Collaboration
features.description: Assign chats, leave internal notes, and track agent performance with ease.

features.title: Demo Mode
features.description: Try every feature in a sandbox environment before connecting your live number.

features.title: Privacy First
features.description: Fully self-hostable. Your data stays on your server, under your control.

showcase.label: DATA-DRIVEN SALES

showcase.description: Track your conversion rates, message delivery stats, and agent response times. Launch broadcast campaigns with personalized variables to skyrocket your engagement.
